analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒較為波動，受中國DeepSeek影響，美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數跌幅最為明顯。同時，巴菲特首次自2006年以來不捐贈給蓋茨基金會，轉至兒童慈善機構。另外，J.B. Hunt的股價在收市後大幅上漲8%，因為燃料費用和其鐵路連接業務需求的增加使得業績受益。投資人正在等待零售銷售數據和失業申報數據，以了解經濟是否足夠放緩以控制通膨。

【結語】
今天市場情緒較為波動，投資人需要保持冷靜和耐心。不要被短期市場波動影響，應該根據長期的投資計畫和基本面進行投資決策。同時，投資人需要注意公司的財務表現和未來發展計畫，以確保投資的安全性和收益性。

【精選個股】
AAPL - 蘋果 - 因為蘋果股價下跌掩蓋了戴爾、Sandisk、Micron的大幅下跌。
JBLU - 聯合航空 - 股價下跌可能會對航空公司造成重大影響。
PYPL - PayPal - 可能會提高投標價格以競爭其他支付平台。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Apple, Google Mask Dell, Sandisk, Micron Sell-Off; J.B. Hunt Jumps Late
items.summary: Dell, Sandisk and Micron led an AI sell-off, masked by megacaps such as Apple. SpaceX undercut its IPO price. Taiwan Semi, GE Aerospace earnings are due.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：蘋果、谷歌掩蓋戴爾、Sandisk、Micron大幅下跌；J.B. Hunt晚場大漲
items.zh_point: 戴爾、Sandisk和Micron領導AI行業的大幅下跌，被蘋果等大型科技股掩蓋。SpaceX的首次公開募股價格低於預期。台積電和GE Aerospace即將公布財報。

items.title: Warren Buffett Just Cut the Bill Gates Foundation From His Annual Donation for the First Time Since 2006. The Missing $4.5 Billion Goes to His Children's Charities.
items.summary: Buffett shifted his plan, but he's still on track to provide the world with billions in giving for decades to come.
items.zh_title: 巴菲特首次自2006年以來不捐贈給蓋茨基金會，$4.5億美元轉至兒童慈善機構
items.zh_point: 巴菲特改變捐贈計畫，但仍將為數十年內提供數十億美元的慈善捐款。

items.title: Why Phoenix Education Partners Dived by Almost 13% Today
items.summary: The parent company of the University of Phoenix published its third-quarter results.
items.zh_title: 鳳凰城教育夥伴公司股價暴跌近13%
items.zh_point: 鳳凰城教育夥伴公司股價今日大幅下跌近13%，原因是該公司的母公司在第三季度發布財務報告。

items.title: The Top Mag 7 Stock Headed Into Q2 Earnings: Jefferies Says Buy Amazon Over Tesla or Apple
items.summary: With Q2 earnings closing in, Jefferies just named its top Magnificent 7 pick and the choice cuts across some of the most widely held retirement stocks in America. One of these three tech giants wins on valuation, one wins on income, and one barely shows up to the fight.
items.zh_title: Jefferies 選出 Q2 財報前七大股票，建議買入亞馬遜而非特斯拉或蘋果
items.zh_point: Jefferies 公布了 Q2 財報前七大股票名單，其中包括三大科技巨頭。其中一家公司因價值優勢被選中，一家因收入優勢被選中，而一家則被認為缺乏競爭力。

items.title: The Real Risk Inside Marvell Stock
items.summary: If you hold Marvell (MRVL) stock, you’ve been on a wild ride. The shares have gained +207% over the past year, even after pulling back from their recent peak. But with that performance comes a new kind of pressure. Management has laid out a vision for growth so ambitious that the stock is now priced for near-flawless execution, leaving very little room for error.
items.zh_title: 馬威股份的真實風險
items.zh_point: 持有馬威股份的投資者經歷了狂野的行情，股價在過去的一年內上漲了 207%，儘管最近曾經回落。然而，這種表現也帶來了新的壓力。公司高層已經提出了一個如此雄心勃勃的成長計畫，股價現在被定價為近乎完美的執行，留下了很少的容錯空間。

items.title: $100M New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
items.summary: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.
items.zh_title: 新澤西百貨店詐騙案告訴人帕頓要求無刑期償責
items.zh_point: 帕頓被控犯下一項詐騙案，該案涉及一家擁有新澤西小型百貨店的公司股價大幅上漲。

items.title: Stock futures are little changed as traders await retail sales and labor data: Live updates
items.summary: Investors are looking ahead to retail sales data and jobless claims for further signs the economy is slowing enough to keep inflation under control.
items.zh_title: 股市未來指數持續不變，投資人等待零售銷售數據和就業數據
items.zh_point: 投資人正在等待零售銷售數據和失業申報數據，以了解經濟是否足夠放緩以控制通膨。

items.title: Jim Cramer says he needs 'cold hard' proof that AI is paying off
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he’s looking for companies to start showing measurable financial returns from their AI investments.
items.zh_title: 克拉默表示需要見證AI投資的實質成果
items.zh_point: 克拉默認為企業應該能夠顯示出其AI投資的可量化財務回報。

items.title: Fed Chairman Warsh says he meets 'often' with Trump administration, defends independence
items.summary: Kevin Warsh said Wednesday that he speaks with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent frequently outside their regular weekly meetings.
items.zh_title: 美聯儲主席沃許表示與川普政府「經常」會面，辯護獨立性
items.zh_point: 美聯儲主席沃許表示，他與財政部長貝森特除了每週例會外，還經常進行其他會面，強調美聯儲的獨立性。

items.title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
items.summary: As part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House financial services committee.
items.zh_title: 美聯儲主席華許在參議院銀行委員會的證詞針對經濟與利率進行討論
items.zh_point: 美聯儲主席華許在參議院銀行委員會的證詞中，針對經濟與利率進行了討論，並就美聯儲政策進行了評估。

items.title: United Airlines gets hit by a $6 billion added-fuel-cost headwind
items.summary: Investors zero in on United’s potentially fatter jet-fuel bill — the airline said it expects nearly $6 billion in additional fuel expenses for the year.
items.zh_title: 聯合航空遭遇6億美元額外燃油成本風險
items.zh_point: 聯合航空預估今年額外燃油費用將達6億美元，投資人關注這可能會對航空公司造成重大影響。

items.title: The trucking market is tighter than it’s been in years — but investors are upbeat on J.B. Hunt
items.summary: Shares of the trucking giant jump 8% after hours, as fuel charges and demand for its railroad-connection business lift results
items.zh_title: 卡車運輸市場比過去多年來都緊張，但投資者對J.B. Hunt感到樂觀
items.zh_point: J.B. Hunt的股價在收市後大幅上漲8%，因為燃料費用和其鐵路連接業務需求的增加使得業績受益。

items.title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
items.summary: “Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000.”
items.zh_title: 母親過世後銀行帳戶陡降九千美元：到底發生了什麼事？
items.zh_point: 一位女士發現母親過世後銀行帳戶從十六萬美元降至九萬美元，銀行的網路服務被切斷後，女士無法查詢帳戶狀況，銀行的處理方式引起了她的疑惑。

items.title: ‘I don’t want to sound callous’: Why base your Social Security claim on life expectancy? We could die at any time.
items.summary: “The actual date of death ultimately affects only the surviving beneficiaries.”
items.zh_title: 為什麼要根據預期壽命來申請社會保障？我們隨時都可能去世。
items.zh_point: 根據預期壽命來申請社會保障，主要是因為死亡日期最終只會影響繼承人的權益。

items.title: Your Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. It’s time for Washington to step in.
items.summary: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators
items.zh_title: 你的Netflix帳單已經在一年多時間內漲了29%。時候讓華盛頓出面干預了。
items.zh_point: Netflix仍然是華爾街的寵兒，但政府監管機構卻將其視為目標。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌 受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數跌幅最為明顯，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金、銀市場收市下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價下跌1.4%，連續兩天下跌；倫敦銀價下跌2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業DeepSeek宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，而且成本低廉，並且不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌引起恐慌，但這種情況被認為是過度恐慌。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信周報：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等公司在科技、媒體和電信領域的最新發展，包括市場分析和投資趨勢。

items.title: Kathmandu Capital Q1 2026 Letter To Investors
items.zh_title: 卡達木尼首都2026年第一季度給投資者信函
items.zh_point: 卡達木尼首都於2026年第一季度發布財務報告，內容可能包括公司財務表現、營運情況和未來發展計畫等資訊。

items.title: TMC the metals company Inc. (TMC) Discusses Project Progress and Addresses Investor Questions in Special Call Transcript
items.zh_title: TMC metals company Inc. (TMC) 進行專案進展討論和投資者問題回答電話會議記錄
items.zh_point: TMC metals company Inc. 進行電話會議，與投資者討論公司專案進展和相關問題。

items.title: PayPal: Gotta Raise The Bid
items.zh_title: PayPal：要抬高投標價格
items.zh_point: PayPal可能會提高投標價格以競爭其他支付平台。

items.title: Producer Price Index: Wholesale Inflation Unexpectedly Falls In June
items.zh_title: 生產者物價指數：六月批發通膨意外下降
items.zh_point: 六月生產者物價指數出乎意料地下降，表明批發通膨率正在放緩。

items.title: Oil stockpiles running dangerously low as Hormuz shuts again, traders warn
items.zh_title: 霍爾木茲海峽再次關閉，石油儲備急速耗盡
items.zh_point: 霍爾木茲海峽再次關閉，石油儲備急速耗盡，市場交易商警告，全球石油儲備可能會因為霍爾木茲海峽的關閉而急速耗盡。

items.title: CoreWeave CFO Nitin Agrawal sells $5.5m in company stock
items.zh_title: CoreWeave CFO Nitin Agrawal 賣出公司股票 550 萬美元
items.zh_point: CoreWeave 公司財務長 Nitin Agrawal 賣出公司股票 550 萬美元，可能與公司財務或股價表現相關。

items.title: New York Times seeks to block subpoenas to reporters over Air Force One reporting
items.zh_title: 紐約時報試圖阻止記者受調查
items.zh_point: 紐約時報試圖阻止美國空軍一號專機採訪記者被傳喚作證，可能涉及調查記者與政府機關之間的資訊交換。

items.title: Eli Lilly in talks to buy psychedelic drugmaker AtaiBeckley - Bloomberg
items.zh_title: 利利公司與精神藥物製造商AtaiBeckley進行談判
items.zh_point: 利利公司正與精神藥物製造商AtaiBeckley進行收購談判，相關細節尚未公布。

items.title: Frequency Electronics earnings missed by $0.89, revenue fell short of estimates
items.zh_title: Frequency Electronics 利潤低於預期，收入未達估計
items.zh_point: Frequency Electronics 的財務報告顯示，其利潤低於預期，收入也未達估計值。這可能是由於公司面臨的挑戰和市場變化所導致。

items.title: Great Southern Bancorp earnings beat by $0.07, revenue topped estimates
items.zh_title: 南方銀行集團盈餘超越預期，收入超越估計
items.zh_point: 南方銀行集團最新財報顯示，其盈餘超越市場預期，收入也遠超估計，表明公司的財務表現良好。
